inputs.label: Total Load
inputs.businessContext: Total active power consumption of connected equipment (Watts)

businessContext_i18n.en: Total active power consumption of connected equipment (Watts)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bağlı ekipmanın toplam aktif güç tüketimi (Watt).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Consommation électrique active totale des équipements connectés (Watts)
Facteur de puissance de la charge (généralement 0,7-0,9), ≤1

inputs.label: Required Runtime
inputs.businessContext: Required backup time in minutes during power outage

businessContext_i18n.en: Required backup time in minutes during power outage
businessContext_i18n.tr: Elektrik kesintisi sırasında gerekli yedekleme süresi (dakika).
businessContext_i18n.de: Erforderliche Backup-Zeit in Minuten bei Stromausfall
businessContext_i18n.fr: Temps de secours requis en minutes en cas de panne de courant

inputs.label: Inverter Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Efficiency of the UPS inverter in converting DC to AC, typically 85-95%

businessContext_i18n.en: Efficiency of the UPS inverter in converting DC to AC, typically 85-95%
businessContext_i18n.tr: UPS invertörünün DC'yi AC'ye dönüştürme verimliliği, tipik olarak %85-95.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wirkungsgrad des USV-Wechselrichters bei der Umwandlung von Gleichstrom in Wechselstrom, typischerweise 85–95 %
businessContext_i18n.fr: Rendement de l'onduleur convertissant le courant continu en courant alternatif, généralement 85-95 %

inputs.label: Battery Voltage
inputs.businessContext: DC system voltage of the battery bank (e.g., 12V, 24V, 48V)

businessContext_i18n.en: DC system voltage of the battery bank (e.g., 12V, 24V, 48V)
businessContext_i18n.de: DC-Systemspannung der Batteriebank (z. B. 12 V, 24 V, 48 V)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension continue du parc de batteries (ex. 12V, 24V, 48V)

inputs.label: Depth of Discharge
inputs.businessContext: Maximum depth of discharge for battery, to prolong life (e.g., 50% for lead-acid)

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum depth of discharge for battery, to prolong life (e.g., 50% for lead-acid)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Akü ömrünü uzatmak için maksimum deşarj derinliği (örn. kurşun-asit için %50).
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Entladetiefe der Batterie zur Verlängerung der Lebensdauer (z. B. 50 % bei Blei-Säure)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Profondeur de décharge maximale de la batterie pour prolonger sa durée de vie (ex. 50 % pour plomb-acide)

inputs.label: Number of Batteries in Parallel
inputs.businessContext: Number of identical batteries connected in parallel to share load

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of identical batteries connected in parallel to share load
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yükü paylaşmak için paralel bağlanan özdeş akü sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl identischer Batterien, die parallel geschaltet sind, um die Last zu teilen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de batteries identiques connectées en parallèle pour partager la charge

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
